pi_items.source: Web search confirming coordinates 8.48N, 83.59W correspond to Sirena Biological Station in Corcovado National Park.
Mathematical conversion of 8.48 degrees to radians (8.48 * pi / 180 = 0.148).
Mathematical conversion of -83.59 degrees to radians (-83.59 * pi / 180 = -1.4589).
Task description strictly requires Sept 15, 2023 06:00 UTC, which python ephem confirms is a new moon phase at local midnight (-6 UTC).
Task description strictly requires Sept 29, 2023 06:00 UTC, which python ephem confirms is a full moon phase at local midnight.
Task description explicitly asks to disable atmosphere/ground and enable planet labels/constellation lines; verified against export_result.sh parsing logic.
Task description instructs agent to create this specific file, matched by NOTES_FILE in export_result.sh.
Task description requires two screenshots (one for Sept 15, one for Sept 29).

privileged_info_summary: The task correctly targets Sirena Biological Station in Corcovado National Park, Costa Rica, with coordinates 8.48N, 83.59W. The specified lunar dates (Sept 15 and Sept 29, 2023 at 06:00 UTC) accurately correspond to the new moon and full moon phases at local midnight. All requested Stellarium configuration states and output paths precisely align with the evaluation scripts.
